items.title: Phone tracking shows how Colombian mercenaries backed Sudan's RSF - report
items.dek: The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.
items.body: The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.

items.title: Domestic workers legally recognised in Indonesia after '22-year struggle'
items.dek: The country is home to some 4.2 million domestic workers - of which almost 90% are women.
items.body: The country is home to some 4.2 million domestic workers - of which almost 90% are women.

items.title: Virginia approves redistricting, giving Democrats edge in midterms
items.dek: The new maps in Virginia could make it easier for Democrats to take control of the US House of Representatives in November.
items.body: The new maps in Virginia could make it easier for Democrats to take control of the US House of Representatives in November.
